programs.title: SBS World News Late
programs.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programs.title: Rise Of The Raven
programs.desc: Pope Eugenius declares a Holy Crusade against the Ottoman Empire and entrusts his papal envoy, cardinal Cesarini with the task of recruiting Hunyadi.

programs.title: Blue Lights
programs.desc: Grace Ellis investigates the punishment shooting of a young McIntyre drug runner, and her old skills as a social worker help get the evidence she needs to bring charges against the gang. However, she is stalled by a senior colleague, who makes it clear that she should back off. When Gordy pulls away from Angela, she becomes desperate for help.

programs.title: Blue Lights
programs.desc: The police ombudsman investigates the team after a disastrous night shift.

programs.title: Classified
programs.desc: In the remote region of Ghanim in the Maghreb, two Quebec engineers are taken hostage; Rachel supervises, on orders from Ottawa, an unsuccessful attempt to capture Robin Denard.

programs.title: Classified
programs.desc: The hunt for Denard gains momentum, but the latter thwarts it and taunts the SSC; Thomassin, who is investigating the hostage taking, consults Philip Miller, who has fallen into disgrace.
